policy_name: Anatolia Kebab House LLC — Owner & Staff Reimbursement Policy

validation_rules.requirement: PA halal slaughterhouse trip (Green Village Packing, Lancaster PA)
validation_rules.notes: Jason files monthly via Frank Moretti

validation_rules.requirement: One full family meal per shift for FOH and BOH staff

validation_rules.notes: Jason approves any receipt above $75; Ayse-side runs need pre-approval
Staff submits worn item, no cash issued
Under $200 Jason alone; $200-$1,000 Jason + Frank; over $1,000 Jason + Frank + Ayse
Yusuf reconciles Main St; Derya reconciles Wayne

context: Rules applied to Anatolia Kebab House owner and staff reimbursement submissions across Paterson and Wayne locations.
